## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and the environments it affects.

## Validation

- [ ] Python unit tests pass.
- [ ] Relevant PowerShell or POSIX shell syntax checks pass.
- [ ] I tested the affected installation or delivery path, or explained why I could not.
- [ ] `VERSION`, `src/notify-ntfy.py`, and `src/notify-ntfy.ps1` remain in sync if this is a release change.

## Privacy and security

- [ ] I did not commit a real `ntfy-config.json`, token, topic, hostname, username, personal path, Codex session, runtime queue/state file, or unredacted log.
- [ ] New network behavior uses safe defaults and does not expose authentication through redirects or insecure transport.

## Notes

Add compatibility risks, rollout details, or follow-up work here.
